commands.narrative:
## Daily Report — 2026-06-09

**Roster:** No changes since yesterday. All 153 enabled strategies carry over unchanged.

### Headline
Both top candidates — **v9shadow-velmono-dev** (score 90.22, STRENGTHENING) and **v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono** (score 82.22, STABLE) — have now cleared three of four promotion gates (n≥100, drop_top3>0, total≥0.5 SOL). The sole remaining barrier is monthly run rate: 2.33 and 2.35 SOL/mo respectively, against the 3.75 SOL/mo bar. Neither is promotable today, but both are the highest-quality positions the bot has ever reached. No other strategy clears even two gates.

### What Accumulated / What Bled
Today shows 0 trades and 0 graduations in today_auto — daily UTC reset artifact, not a pipeline failure. diagnose.json reports HEALTHY: last graduation 417s ago, last shadow trade 357s ago, pipeline fully active. Yesterday n_trades=1,655.

Lifetime leave-one-out P&L: **v9shadow-velmono-dev** +3.00 SOL total, +1.26 drop_top3 (58% top-3 contribution — fat-tail but robust). **v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono** +2.87 SOL, +0.51 drop_top3 (82% top-3 concentration — secondary). **75 strategies INVALID at n≥100** with drop3≤0 or total<0; worst bleeder v35-vel2050-holders10 at −13.45 SOL.

### Cross-Day Patterns
v9shadow-velmono-dev has held the #1 readiness score for 7 consecutive days (96.82→91.85→87.15→90.12→91.85→90.22→90.22). STRENGTHENING edge flag and positive drop_top3 confirm real edge. v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono top-3 for 6 consecutive days; lower drop_top3 (+0.51) = secondary candidate.

**Edge decay epidemic**: 25+ strategies DECAYING with recent-30 medians −11% to −35% vs near-zero all-time. v43 trailSL family, v40-whale-cap, v40-vel-band, v52a-sm-shape most severely impacted. Persistent regime shift.

**Kill backlog (critical)**: Kill proposals from June 2–8 (7+ days, 40+ strategies) unexecuted. v47 ablation cluster alone bleeding −7 to −9 SOL each at n≥100. Executing the backlog is the single highest-leverage action today.

**v25-bot-excl-climbing**: n=672, total=−0.035 SOL, drop_top3=−2.357 SOL — unambiguously INVALID. Promotion hold (ai-2026-06-02-006) superseded; recommend kill.

### Operator Next Step
Execute June 2–8 kill backlog, create v50-holders250-shadow (opt_avg_ret=24.25%, Panel7 ROBUST), then let v9shadow-velmono-dev accumulate toward the monthly bar (~3–4 weeks at current rate).
